name: O.R.C. Northern Scorpling
description: The O.R.C. Northern Scorpling is the miniature accelerated version of the Northern Scorpion under O.R.C. control. It is still small, but now it fights with far more intent to harass and open space for larger scorpions.
behavior: It patrols sandy zones, caves, and O.R.C. points on short aggressive routes. It enters combat quickly and tries to stay glued to the player to keep applying pressure.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks as soon as it sees you and usually does so as part of a bigger group. Its single-hit damage is not huge, but it is excellent at breaking your rhythm.
interactionWithCreatures: It works as light support for larger O.R.C. scorpion variants, going in first to pin you down and create openings for the heavy hitters.
strategy: Busting damage is still the cleanest way to erase it quickly. Do not let several stick to you at once, and remove them before focusing on the larger scorpions.

abilities.name: Claw Slash
abilities.description: A quick claw swipe used to start the exchange and keep you busy.
